programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern showcases venison two ways: a delicate grilled paillard with artichokes and parmesan, and a rich, slow-braised Polish hunter's stew with kielbasa, mushrooms, and sauerkraut. Served with grilled leeks and coal-roasted potatoes.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern goes primal with two antelope dishes: a Greek-style whole leg roasted over the open fire with a lemony avgolemono sauce and crispy potatoes, and a simple antelope tenderloin carpaccio served with roasted tomatoes and parmesan.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern makes two different dishes with red snapper: fried snapper fingers with a spicy chile-orange mayonnaise dipping sauce and a slow-roasted whole fish with an herb salad and charred miso sweet potatoes.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern makes a homemade barbecue rub, basting sauce and barbecue sauce for wild boar ribs. Next, chef shares his twist on a classic southern shrimp and grits recipe, adding a side of beautiful wild mushrooms.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares chicken fried axis deer. Next, Chef Zimmern poaches halibut in tomato roux.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores Minnesota's forests for wild mushrooms. He creates a simple grilled mushroom salad, then hand-shapes cavatelli pasta tossed with golden chanterelles, butter, garlic, thyme, and colatura. He shares foraging and cleaning tips.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen

programme.desc: Pati is in the magic town of Maní to learn about something sacred to the Mayans - bees and honey. A group of women who protect the endangered Melipona, a stingless bee native to Yucatán, invites her to join in a Mayan energy cleansing ritual.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Tekit The Capital of the Guayabera Pati encounters a tale of sons going against their father's wishes to follow their own path. Pati meets a farmer's son who went against his father to build a family business making the iconic Guayabera shirts.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores the streets of Yucatán's capital, Mérida. She tries the best tacos in Mérida at Wayan'e. The aroma of freshly made cookies lures her to Dondé Fabric, where their globitos and bizcochitos are an important part of Mérida's mornings.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits Chef Wilson Alonzo in his hometown of Halachó to prepare a traditional Cochinita Pibil in an underground pit. Pati helps Wilson prepare the achiote marinade, along with his grandmother who taught him traditional cooking.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati arrives in Motul, a town in the history books for Yucatán's once thriving henequén industry and for the egg dish Huevos Motuleños. Pati meets Doña Evelia, who put Motul back on the map with her world-famous recipe.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Temozón is the birthplace of Yucatán's signature smoked meat Carne Ahumada and everyone in town claims to have a relative who invented it. Pati strolls around town to try different versions of Carne Ahumada.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati returns to Mérida to meet sisters, Delia and Maria Elide, who love to cook and laugh and are famous for recados - pastes of spices and aromatic herbs that season Yucatecan foods. In Uxmal, she learns about ingredients that make recados unique.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: No trip to Yucatán is complete without seeing a beautiful cenote, natural freshwater pools in caves. To learn more about Mayan communities, Pati visits Cenote Xocempich with lawyer Zoila Cen, who has dedicated her career to helping Mayan people.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: An ingredient Pati constantly uses is salt and Yucatán has one of the most unique salts. The Las Coloradas salt, which means blush red, gets its distinctive color from red algae. Felipe Perez takes Pati to the pink lakes where the salt is produced.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Yaxunah, Pati discovers Yucatán's league of their own. She joins the Amazonas, a softball team of indigenous women, for their morning practice. As they built a name for themselves, they overcame the mindset that women belong in the kitchen.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat and his buddy Leonard Botello use the flavors of the beloved native Post Oak to smoke a perfect Central Texas-style beef brisket.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat visits his close friend Wayne Mueller, third-generation pitmaster of Louis Mueller's BBQ, to learn the ins and outs of his famous dino beef ribs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to Decatur, Alabama to visit a storied institution of barbecue - Big Bob Gibson's. There, he learns the ins, the outs, and the history of a regional delicacy: pit-cooked chicken with Alabama white sauce.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to a picturesque cattle farm in California's Santa Maria Valley, to hear firsthand from a young pitmaster who has uncovered the secrets of real Santa Maria barbecue.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat grills riverside with renowned chef Vivek Surti, crafting lamb mamna and chicken kebabs inspired by his Indian heritage.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat visits Houston to go Gulf Bay fishing with chef Chris Shepherd, hoping to catch some redfish and gather a side of blue crabs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A team of ex-special forces soldiers on the lam from the military police (even though they didn't really commit the crime for which they'd been imprisoned) leaves a trail of explosions in its wake. But Hannibal, Faceman, B.A. and Murdock always stop to help the little guy against some corrupt local bigwig before escaping the MPs once again.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lives hang in the balance as detectives and prosecutors pursue justice in New York City. In cases ripped from the headlines, police investigate serious and often deadly crimes, weighing the evidence and questioning the suspects until someone is taken into custody. The district attorney's office then builds a case to convict the perpetrator by proving them guilty beyond a reasonable doubt. Working

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Dr. Temperance Brennan, a forensic anthropologist who works at the Jeffersonian Institution and also writes books, has an impressive ability to read clues from victims' bones. Consequently, law enforcement calls her to assist with investigations when remains are so badly decomposed, burned or destroyed that standard identification methods are useless. Brennan is teamed with Special Agent Seeley Bo

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Junk dealer Fred Sanford runs roughshod over his son and partner, Lamont, in a groundbreaking sitcom. Fred's moneymaking schemes routinely backfire, and he does just about anything to get out of working -- up to and including faking a heart attack. He's rude, sarcastic, outspoken, overtly prejudiced, and pretty darn nasty to his friends and family.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lives hang in the balance as detectives and prosecutors pursue justice in New York City. In cases ripped from the headlines, police investigate serious and often deadly crimes, weighing the evidence and questioning the suspects until someone is taken into custody. The district attorney's office then builds a case to convict the perpetrator by proving them guilty beyond a reasonable doubt. Working

programme.title: Destinos cruzados
programme.desc: Toprak despierta de un coma tras cinco años sin recordar nada de su pasado, y regresa a una familia que no reconoce, incluida su prometida de toda la vida y un niño que vive con él. Sin embargo, su amnesia lo mantiene en una incertidumbre constante.

programme.title: La reina del flow
programme.desc: Yeimy Montoya paga una injusta condena en Nueva York tras haber sido engañada por el hombre que amaba. Por lo tanto, hace un pacto con las autoridades judiciales para capturar al hombre que asesinó a su familia.

programme.title: Pantanal
programme.desc: José Leôncio, hacendado del Pantanal, deja a una joven embarazada en una visita a Río de Janeiro. Ella va a vivir con él al Pantanal, pero es infeliz y decide volver a la ciudad con su hijo. Veinte años después, este va en busca de su padre.

programme.title: Jesús
programme.desc: La trayectoria de Jesucristo antes de la resurrección. Sus milagros y el calvario de la cruz. Las vidas de quienes fueron curados por Jesucristo y quiénes eran los apóstoles.

programme.title: Destinos cruzados

programme.title: La luz de mi vida
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de su esposo Hakan, Elif descubre que él llevaba una doble vida y tenía una hija con una mujer llamada Firat.

programme.title: Bajo el mismo cielo
programme.desc: La historia de Carlos Martínez, un padre mexicano indocumentado que vive en Los Ángeles, un hombre trabajador y honrado que lucha para darle una mejor vida a sus dos hijos Luis y Rodrigo, pero su mayor temor es ser deportado y perder a su familia.

programme.desc: In Southern California, law enforcement hunt for a serial killer who is targeting elderly women within a few mile radius; after weeks of searching, a survivor comes forward with a description that blows the case wide open.

programme.title: Crush With Lee & Tiffany
programme.desc: Lee and Tiffany Lakosky have blazed a trail within the outdoor industry proving that hard work, perseverance, dedication and skill can accomplish anything; together with their children, Cameron Lee Lakosky and Raygen Joan Lakosky; their Labrador retrievers and a revolving roster of family and friends, the duo have figured out the formula for crushing some of the biggest game there is.

programme.title: Addicted to the Outdoors
programme.desc: Come along as the Brunson's continue their look back, this week checking out their most memorable moments from Season 6 of Addicted to the Outdoors, packed into one epic episode.

programme.desc: Follow Capt. George in search of fish and adventure.

programme.title: BigWater Adventures
programme.desc: The fall redfish run out of St. Simon's Island, GA is like clockwork.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa
programme.desc: When you feel the need to hunt down Africa's wildest predatory beasts on light tackle, you need go no further than the wilds of, Tiger Land.

programme.title: Hooked on Travel
programme.desc: The high-altitude water of Sterkfontein in South Africa is sight fishing at its finest. The team head to the Free state in search of yellow fish that are attuned to the surface.

programme.title: Heartland Bowhunter
programme.desc: Kansas is near and dear to the Wirsig Family and roles seem to have been reversed as Fisher hunts hard to fill his tag and Mike has some first day luck!

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace (Debra Messing) backs out of a charity commitment after she has already convinced Will (Eric McCormack) to participate.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Ellen and Rob announce their engagement, Grace confesses to Will that she once had an affair with Rob.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace befriends her kleptomaniac neighbor; Jack crashes a party for former homosexuals to sway a recent convert back to the gay life.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace visit their retired professor (Orson Bean); Karen tries to prepare a home-cooked meal for Stan's birthday.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace finds out that one of Karen's friends is her competition for an important interior design job; Jack convinces Will to help him in his latest venture.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will discovers that Grace is dating his boss; Rosario requests a divorce from Jack so that she can marry Karen's gardener.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will discovers that Grace is dating his boss; Rosario requests a divorce from Jack so that she can marry Karen's gardener.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will (Eric McCormack) returns from the Caribbean to discover Grace (Debra Messing) has a new best friend, Jack (Sean Hayes).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will's apartment becomes a haven for Grace after a break-in attempt; Jack and Karen are not speaking.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack and Will (Sean Hayes, Eric McCormack) visit two old party buddies (guest stars Jerry Levine and Tim Bagley) and discover they are giving parenthood a try.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace (Debra Messing) is appalled when her new intern (guest star Natasha Lyonne) suddenly emulates Karen (Megan Mullally) and takes on her brash persona.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace finds it hard to call it quits with Ben; Jack livens up his failing cabaret act at Will's expense.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace rejects an ex-boyfriend's suggestion that she participate with him and his girlfriend in a romantic escapade; when she confides in Will and Karen, the conservative Grace considers throwing caution to the wind.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will is terrified by revelations made to him by a fortuneteller; pop icon Cher encounters her biggest fan, Jack.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: A crucial confession highlights Thanksgiving 1985, when college student Grace (Debra Messing) takes boyfriend Will (Eric McCormack) home to meet her family. With Sean Hayes and Megan Mullally.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: A crucial confession highlights Thanksgiving 1985, when college student Grace (Debra Messing) takes boyfriend Will (Eric McCormack) home to meet her family. With Sean Hayes and Megan Mullally.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace (Debra Messing) has trouble accepting her new beau (guest star Ken Marino) when she learns he has six toes on one of his feet.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will (Eric McCormack) is bothered when he feels Grace (Debra Messing) is acting more like a nagging wife than a friend.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace (Eric McCormack, Debra Messing) pose as millionaires while visiting the townhouse of Sandra Bernhard (guest starring as herself).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will (Eric McCormack) enlists Grace (Debra Messing) to help him improve his batting skills in hopes of impressing a new friend (guest star Patrick Dempsey).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will is torn over ending his newfound relationship with Matt, a rising TV sportscaster who is extremely reluctant to let the world know about his sexual preference; he continues to refer to Will as his brother.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace (Debra Messing) regrets selling her late uncle's old car to a nun (guest star Ellen DeGeneres) and attempts to get it back.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace catches Will's philandering father (Sydney Pollack) on the arm of a glamorous stranger (Lesley Ann Warren).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace is shocked when she catches Will's philandering father (Syndney Pollack) on the arm of a glamorous stranger (Lesley Ann Warren).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace is smitten when she meets Sumner, the charming and handsome nephew of Karen; Grace's attempts to arrange a date are constantly thwarted when Karen conjures up a litany of lies to dissuade her.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace (Debra Messing) ruins Will's (Eric McCormack) weekly poker game; Jack and Karen (Sean Hayes, Megan Mullally) target a plastic surgery guinea pig.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace buys a piano in hope of strengthening her friendship with Will.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace gives romantic advice to a slovenly neighbor (Woody Harrelson) in hope of reuniting him with his girlfriend so he will move away.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace (Debra Messing) attends the funeral of a former high-school classmate whom she used to bully. Guest star: Todd Stashwick.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace tries to keep secret her embarrassing romance with a slovenly neighbor (Woody Harrelson); Jack revels in the attention given to him by Grace's eccentric friend (Molly Shannon).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace tries to keep the peace between her slovenly boyfriend and a resentful Will; Jack plans to meet his father for the first time.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace tries to keep the peace between her slovenly boyfriend and a resentful Will; Jack plans to meet his father for the first time.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace (Eric McCormack, Debra Messing) resume their chummy relationship, leaving Nathan (guest star Woody Harrelson) feeling left out in the cold; Jack (Sean Hayes) and his son go school shopping.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will suffers flashbacks when a childhood bully (Adam Goldberg) is hired by his law firm.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack coerces Grace into posing as his son Elliot's date to a school dance.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Stan is arrested for tax evasion, Grace moves into Karen's apartment to help her worried friend.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack sets up unsuspecting Will on a date with a smitten supervisor; Grace and Nathan swap sexual histories.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Nathan's marriage proposal doesn't fulfill Grace's childhood fantasy, and she finds it dispiriting.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will, Jack and Karen try and rouse a devastated and bed-ridden Grace after she loses her boyfriend, Nathan.

programme.title: Will & Grace

Unsure about his sudden fame, Claude remains reserved, becoming friends with radio station secretary Marjorie (Jane Wyman) and developing an electronic gadget on the side. When he abruptly embraces his popularity, Claude gets a swelled head and fa

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent
programme.desc: Crime reporter John Jones (Joel McCrea) is turning in nothing but dull copy. His editor, unhappy with his work, hopes a change of scenery will be the thing Jones needs to get back on track. Re-assigned to Europe as a foreign correspondent, Jones is very much out of his element. When he stumbles on a spy ring, he feels ill-equipped to unravel the truth alone and he seeks help from a beautiful polit

programme.title: It's Always Fair Weather
programme.desc: After returning from World War II, three soldiers (Gene Kelly, Dan Dailey, Michael Kidd) share a drink in a New York City bar. Together, they agree to return to the same location in 10 years. When the appointed date arrives, the three men reunite -- only to discover that none of them has achieved his goals. However, when program coordinator Jackie Leighton (Cyd Charisse) catches wind of their meet

programme.title: It Should Happen to You
programme.desc: After two years of failing to make it big in New York City, small-town model and actress Gladys Glover (Judy Holliday) takes a gamble by investing in billboard advertising to get her name out there. Almost immediately her risk pays off, and she finds herself inundated with media requests and fans, including the affections of the wealthy Evan Adams III (Peter Lawford) of the Adams Soap company. Whi

programme.title: Being There
programme.desc: Simple-minded Chance (Peter Sellers), a gardener who has resided in the Washington, D.C., townhouse of his wealthy employer for his entire life and been educated only by television, is forced to vacate his home when his boss dies. While wandering the streets, he encounters business mogul Ben Rand (Melvyn Douglas), who assumes Chance to be a fellow upper-class gentleman. Soon Chance is ushered into

programme.title: My Favorite Year
programme.desc: Fledgling comic Benjy Stone (Mark Linn-Baker) can't believe his luck when his childhood hero, the swashbuckling matinee idol Alan Swann (Peter O'Toole), gets booked to appear on the variety show he writes for. But when Swann arrives, he fails to live up to his silver screen image. Instead, he's a drunken womanizer who suffers from stage fright. Benjy is assigned to look after him before the show,

programme.title: The Sunshine Boys
programme.desc: Al Lewis (George Burns) and Willy Clark (Walter Matthau) are a pair of feuding vaudeville comedians (Lewis and Clark, naturally) who performed together for 47 years before finally calling it quits. A network genius then has the brilliant idea of reuniting the duo for a TV special about the history of comedy. Once the reunion is on, the sparks and one-liners start to fly with equal speed. But can L

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Days
programme.desc: Victorian-era Englishman Phileas Fogg (David Niven) proclaims before his fellow members of a London gentleman's club that he can circumnavigate the globe in a mere 80 days, further boasting that he will bet the princely sum of 20,000 pounds on the success of his endeavor. With his stalwart manservant Passepartout (Cantinflas) alongside, he goes forth on his adventure, pursued by a dogged Police In

programme.title: A Passage to India
programme.desc: Based on the renowned E.M. Forster novel, this expansive period drama centers on the changing dynamic between British colonials and native locals in India during the 1920s. When an outing to explore scenic caves ends in English tourist Adela Quested (Judy Davis) accusing Indian doctor Aziz Ahmed (Victor Banerjee) of rape, the incident results in a major court case, one that reinforces tensions bet

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: Dr. Ben McKenna (James Stewart) is on vacation with his wife (Doris Day) and son in Morocco when a chance encounter with a stranger sets their trip, and their lives, on a drastically different course. The stranger, killed in front of the family in the marketplace, reveals an assassination plot to the Americans. The couple's son is abducted in order to ensure the plot is kept secret, and suddenly t

programme.title: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Intellectually precocious teenager Lauren King lives in Paris with her somewhat ditzy mother. On a movie set, she strikes up a friendship with teenage film buff Daniel Michon. After Lauren's mother forbids her to date the outspoken Daniel, the young lovebirds team up with eccentric pickpocket Julius to run away to Venice, where, according to legend, a couple who kiss under the Bridge of Sighs will

programme.title: Juarez
programme.desc: In an effort to maintain control of Mexico, Napoleon III (Claude Rains) of France installs the puppet leader Emperor Maximilian (Brian Aherne) to execute his commands and to wrest power from Benito Juárez (Paul Muni), Mexico's elected president. Maximilian questions his role, but his power-hungry wife, Empress Carlota (Bette Davis), pushes him to remain emperor. However, the will of the people and

programme.title: Fiesta
programme.desc: Handsome young man Mario Morales (Ricardo Montalban) feels great pressure to become a bullfighter, since his father, Antonio (Fortunio Bonanova), was a famous toreador. However, Mario really aspires to be a composer, and his beautiful sister, Maria (Esther Williams), is the one who wants to enter the bullring. Eventually, the clever Maria disguises herself as Mario to pursue her dream of being a b

programme.title: The Champ
programme.desc: Champ is a down-on-his-luck boxer in Tijuana whose son, Dink, adores him despite Champ's addictions to alcohol and gambling. When Champ wins enough money from a bet to buy Dink a horse, they enter it into a race, where they encounter Linda, Dink's mother, whom he has never met. Linda's rich new husband, Tony, convinces Champ to let Dink come and stay with them, but Dink's love for his father bring

programme.title: The Brave One
programme.desc: A Mexican boy (Michel Ray) seeks a presidential pardon for his pet bull, sold to face a matador in the bullring.

programme.title: Cowboy
programme.desc: A successful rancher, Tom Reece (Glenn Ford), forges a business venture with a Mexican landowner (Donald Randolph) but finds himself in a bind after squandering a lot of money at a hotel run by Frank Harris (Jack Lemmon). programme.title: The Treasure of the Sierra Madre
programme.desc: In this classic adventure film, two rough-and-tumble wanderers, Dobbs (Humphrey Bogart) and Curtin (Tim Holt), meet up with a veteran prospector, Howard (Walter Huston), in Mexico and head into the Sierra Madre mountains to find gold. programme.title: The Night of the Iguana
programme.desc: Lusty defrocked minister Lawrence Shannon (Richard Burton) is a tour guide in Mexico. Leading a tourist group from a Baptist women's college, he finds it difficult to avoid acting on his attraction to Charlotte (Sue Lyon), the young niece of the group's leader, Judith Fellowes (Grayson Hall). programme.title: The Best Years of Our Lives
programme.desc: Fred, Al and Homer are three World War II veterans facing difficulties as they re-enter civilian life. Fred (Dana Andrews) is a war hero who, unable to compete with more highly skilled workers, has to return to his low-wage soda jerk job. programme.title: Sweet Bird of Youth
programme.desc: After unsuccessfully trying his luck in Hollywood, charming gigolo Chance Wayne (Paul Newman) wanders back to his hometown, accompanied by Alexandra Del Lago (Geraldine Page), a movie star on the wane. programme.desc: Designing wearable soup cans inspired by Andy Warhol; creating Studio 54 disco looks; Tituss Burgess and Shay Mitchell guest judge.

programme.title: Carmen Jones
programme.desc: Screen version of the musical Carmen Jones, which adapted Bizet's opera Carmen for an African-American cast. A soldier falls for Dandridge, a seductive factory worker. The lovers flee after the soldier kills his sergeant, but Carmen's taunting faithlessness drives her lover to a crime of passion.

programme.title: Love Again
programme.desc: Coping with the loss of her fiancé, Mira Ray sends a series of romantic texts to his old cellphone number, not realizing it was reassigned to journalist Rob Burns. Rob becomes captivated by the honesty of her words in the beautifully constructed texts. When he's assigned to write a profile of superstar Celine Dion, he enlists her help to figure out how to meet Mira in person -- and win her heart.

One of them panics the following day when she suspects she really h

programme.title: Surf Party

programme.title: Anastasia

programme.title: Laura
programme.desc: In one of the most celebrated 1940s film noirs, Manhattan detective Mark McPherson (Dana Andrews) investigates the murder of Madison Avenue executive Laura Hunt (Gene Tierney) in her fashionable apartment. On the trail of her murderer, McPherson quizzes Laura's arrogant best friend, gossip columnist Waldo Lydecker (Clifton Webb) and her comparatively mild fiancé, Shelby Carpenter (Vincent Price).

programme.title: The Snake Pit
programme.desc: In this psychological drama, Virginia Cunningham (Olivia de Havilland) is confused upon finding herself in a mental hospital, with no memory of her arrival at the institution. programme.title: The Three Faces of Eve

programme.title: Hush... Hush, Sweet Charlotte

programme.title: On The Court
programme.desc: Hear from UCLA's Lauren and Sienna Betts. See how Michigan's Olivia Olson is setting herself up for success. Learn how Amy and Anna Terrian support each other on and off the court at Michigan State. Get to know Penn State's Kiyomi McMiller. Learn how USC's Rian Forestier has continued to give back to her community.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Basketball
programme.desc: Hannes Steinbach on the legacy of German-born players at Washington. Hear from Illinois' Keaton Wagler. Learn about Morez Johnson Jr.'s connection with former Michigan football great, Tai Streets. Plus, go behind the scenes as the Wolverines travel to Champaign to face the Fighting Illini.

programme.title: The B1G Story
programme.desc: Take a closer look at the Michigan State basketball tradition of kissing the floor at center court on senior night. Hear from coach Tom Izzo, former Spartan players Mateen Cleaves, Shawn Respert, Draymond Green as they reflect on the tradition.
